name: Tungurahua
eruptionHistory: Reactivated in 1999 after 80 years of dormancy. Was in intermittent eruption from 1999 to 2016 with periodic explosions and pyroclastic flows.
description: Tungurahua, meaning 'Throat of Fire' in Quechua, rises dramatically above the city of Baños. Its long eruption cycle from 1999 to 2016 required periodic evacuations.
